name: orqis
description: CLI + SDK for linting repository instruction files and governing instruction context

scripts.dev: npm run build && node dist/cli.js instructions-lint fixtures/instructions/valid-repo
scripts.smoke: npm run build && node dist/cli.js inspect fixtures/openai-request.json && node dist/cli.js diff fixtures/turn-1.json fixtures/turn-2.json && node dist/cli.js budget fixtures/anthropic-request.json --model claude-3-5-sonnet-latest && node dist/cli.js agent-report fixtures/agent-snapshot.json && node dist/cli.js check fixtures/anthropic-request.json --model claude-3-5-sonnet-latest --max-total-tokens 100 --max-usage-percent 1 --fail-on-risk high && node dist/cli.js instructions-lint fixtures/instructions/valid-repo

author: Mahesh Narayan <maheshn1@icloud.com>
